clues.clue_text: In Norse myth, world held up by the branches of the tree Yggdrasil
Maker of the old Flying Cloud auto
"The Office" accountant who kept a cat in her desk drawer
Religious title that translates to "ocean monk"
Heart on one's sleeve, perhaps, in brief
Condition treated with a CPAP machine

Nickname derived from the Hebrew name Shoshana
Alternatives to zippers on blue jeans
Entertainer's creation at a child's birthday party
Gertrude who swam the English Channel
Many a hedge fund hire, in brief
It's the end of the world
Longest book in the Book of Mormon
"A passport to human development," per the United Nations
